mapper.select: select item_id, order_id, product_id, product_code, product_name, specification, unit, quantity, unit_price, total_price, create_time from oms_order_item where order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into oms_order_item(order_id, product_id, product_code, product_name, specification, unit, quantity, unit_price, total_price, create_time) values(#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalPrice}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: update oms_order_item set del_flag = '2' where order_id = #{orderId}
